aka: The Rain on the First Night
trans_title: The Rain on the First Night
introduction: SYNOPSISA strange man follows the honeymoon car carrying Ji-hyun and Sang-hyun as they speed down a road. As they enjoy the beautiful scenery of Jeju Island, the strange man lingers behind watching them. Ji-hyun and Sang-hyun fail to consummate their marriage together, but Sang-hyun believes that Ji-hyun is too nervous and shy. But when they fail for the third night in a row and when Ji-hyun scratches his neck, Sang-hyun's patience runs out. He demands an explanation but Ji-hyun can only cry. Sang-hyun walks out of the hotel and Ji-hyun leaves too after receiving a strange phone call. She begins to quicken her pace when she senses someone is following her.故事姬桑 - 炫拿着一个度蜜月的新婚夫妇的梦想之车，似乎走在后面的人的出现。济州的美丽风光展开显示吉的外观桑 - 炫，享受你的蜜月但似乎看着他们那男子气概的样子。第一晚桑 - 炫吉将支付即使不说话姬生的拒绝 - 炫会放弃，想同时，艾米是害羞。但是，如果没有被一对夫妇，甚至是第三个晚上桑 - 炫被划伤曼达艾米的脖子。愤怒桑 - 炫是艾米艾米的原因一直无人接听桑唯一的一站 - 炫爆只是哭了出来，并丢弃的酒店房间。艾米终于离开了酒店，也因为一个奇怪的电话给艾米散步随意的方式。但艾米她觉得他奇怪的家伙的存在seuchideut旋转各地的困惑和加快步伐。
